query:
SELECT s.id, s.serviceId, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.status, s.locationAddress, s.connectionId, s.phoneNumber, s.monthlyCost, s.supplierName, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, c.name as linkedCustomerName, c.externalId as linkedCustomerExtId
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.connectionId IN ('AVC000114712291','AVC000231649853','AVC400038259684','AVC000178025232')
   OR s.phoneNumber IN ('0732625890','0249366007','0755380557','0393742425','07 3262 5890','02 4936 6007','07 5538 0557','03 9374 2425')
ORDER BY s.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT s.id, s.serviceId, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.status, s.locationAddress, s.connectionId, s.phoneNumber, s.monthlyCost, s.supplierName, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, c.name as linkedCustomerName, c.externalId as linkedCustomerExtId
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.connectionId IN ('AVC000114712291','AVC000231649853','AVC400038259684','AVC000178025232')
   OR s.phoneNumber IN ('0732625890','0249366007','0755380557','0393742425','07 3262 5890','02 4936 6007','07 5538 0557','03 9374 2425')
ORDER BY s.id;
